{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317332515DDC675BDE2C04E92B8"}"},"total":2552},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601931043086615321","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，我一直都没有什么耐心去看校园的，误打误撞进来看的，但是慢慢看着看着就发现这个小说剧情不快不慢我就很喜欢，女主是一个因为家庭所以感情很谈，但是对妈妈的爱是有期待的，所以男主的直接喜欢确定了就追不会因为追不到就恼羞成怒，这个就是我所期待的爱情吧！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769967455,"group_id":"7529586528876497945","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最好的爱是陪伴，最好的风景是与你同看。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2denUtwMR1GhdSxn7se0gYTIsaKO0DCB9dagnhSt47U","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/907f0a83569f4fd890cc7ad17423b270~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789176&x-signature=gDHHgiPTXE0POSk9%2F90rlF4MHqg%3D","user_id":"3402327827943850","user_name":"丞楠旧事"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3402327827943850","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529586528876497945","book_info":{"abstract":"（混不吝又痞又帅的校霸X清冷美人好到没脾气的‘乖乖女’学霸）浪子回头，玩世不恭，校园恋爱，甜虐救赎，破镜重圆，1v1双洁

“沈梨，你还可以复读，别拿自己的前程开玩笑，下届清北保送名额，你还有机会。”

“不了老师，我想好了，我想去鹜川念书。”

——承德大学，一所不入流的大专学校。

沈梨拿着高考一门语文149分，其余五门都是零的成绩，去了承德大学。

开学去大专学校报道那天，沈梨无意惹到了校霸的女朋友。

下课就被校霸跟那帮兄弟，堵在了教室走廊。

这个坏学生谢钦有点凶，“这位同学，听说你很拽啊，欺负我女朋友？”

沈梨被吓到了，有些怕他，低着头跟他道歉：“对不起。”

后来，只要有他在的地方沈梨扭头就走，避之不及。

*

谢钦从来没有这么费劲，追过一个人。

沈梨很乖的坐在木椅上，谢钦单膝半跪在地，握着她的手，眼睛湿红。

他已经拿她没办法了。

“沈梨，我是你养的鱼吗？”

“…”

“我们试试好不好？”

“老子，求你了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/52ab3c9bce0271d160f2184ddefafed8","author":"朝凤鸣","author_id":"","book_id":"7529586528876497945","book_name":"她太难撩！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#285828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"41.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7529586566721700377","read_count":"416498","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"331223"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"157","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,校园,学霸,双洁,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eb6bf519906b6d6e625aa4785b8ca40c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442405&x-signature=CLOZ9qEV5HaTJPh8Na70Erz3lqM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111184861065","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"61"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317332515DDC675BDE2C04E92B8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_boo
